title: agrostis canescens
intro: Agrostis canescens, also known as hoary bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis canescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an expectorant to alleviate coughs and congestion. Agrostis canescens can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
